accurate.why: All claims match the bill text and accurately describe the Congressional Review Act and the disapproved DOE rule.

no_hallucinations.why: The CRA reference and contextual details are accurate; no fabricated claims present.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the bill as a CRA disapproval of the DOE commercial refrigeration rule.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Correctly explains the rule is nullified under chapter 8 of title 5 and has no force or effect.

exceptions_conditions.why: The bill contains no exceptions or conditions, as the summary correctly notes.

effective_dates.why: Summary correctly states the approval date of May 9, 2025, and passage dates.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the sole operative effect: disapproval and nullification of the specified rule.

objective_tone.why: The summary is neutral and descriptive without editorializing.

coherent.why: The summary is well-organized and internally consistent.

concise.why: The summary is appropriately brief with no padding or filler.

correct_entities.why: Correctly names the Office of Energy Efficiency and Renewable Energy, DOE, and the CRA.

correct_figures.why: The Federal Register citation, publication date, and passage/approval dates are all accurate.
